lessons.title: Memory Addresses
lessons.description: Understand where data lives in the computer's memory.

lessons.title: References
lessons.description: Create alias names for existing variables.

lessons.title: Pointers
lessons.description: Store the memory address of another variable.

lessons.title: Dereferencing
lessons.description: Access data through its memory address.

lessons.title: Modify Pointers
lessons.description: Change the value of variables through dereferenced pointers.
